articles.title: RUN MODEL INFERENCE ON NVIDIA B200 GPUS WITH BASETEN
articles.summary: Baseten is now offering inference on NVIDIA B200 GPUs. B200s are ideal for workloads with aggressive throughput, latency, and cost requirements. By leveraging B200 GPUs, Baseten customers are achieving:

articles.title: Run model inference on B200 GPUs with Baseten
GROK CANVAS-LIKE TOOL FOR DOCUMENT CREATION
articles.summary: Grok, the chatbot from xAI, now includes Grok Studio, a canvas-like tool to build documents and basic apps. It's now live for all users.

articles.title: LATENTS FOR GENERATIVE MODELING
articles.summary: Candidate for best blog post of the year for folks interested in generative modeling. This post breaks down the history, intuition, and key innovations for learned latents.

articles.title: OPENAI O3 AND O4-MINI
articles.summary: OpenAI has released the new o3 and o4-mini models, which improve ChatGPT's tool use and enable smarter, faster reasoning with integrated web search, file analysis, and image generation.

articles.title: NVIDIA'S TEMPORALLY CONSISTENT VIDEO DIFFUSION
articles.summary: NVIDIA's EquivDM is a framework that enhances video diffusion by using consistent noise for better motion tracking and 3D-consistent outputs with fewer sampling steps.

articles.title: INTELLECT 2 DISTRIBUTED TRAINING
articles.summary: Prime Intellect has trained a 32B network, fully distributed, with reinforcement learning for reasoning. It has open sourced a substantial amount of its code and useful libraries.

articles.title: M1: TOWARDS SCALABLE TEST-TIME COMPUTE WITH MAMBA REASONING MODELS
articles.summary: M1 is a Mamba reasoning model that has been trained with extended test time computation. It doesn't fully match state-of-the-art models, but it shows strong performance, especially on long context and through-put.

articles.title: DEEPMATH DATASET
articles.summary: 103K examples of highly filtered and decontaminated math problems for reasoning model training.

articles.title: PRIMA CPP
articles.summary: Prima CPP is an extension of llama.cpp that tries to enable mmaping of memory for large models to enable them to run on low RAM environments.

articles.title: TILE LANGUAGE
articles.summary: Tile Language is a concise domain-specific language designed to streamline the development of high-performance GPU/CPU kernels (e.g., GEMM, Dequant GEMM, FlashAttention, and LinearAttention). By employing a Pythonic syntax with an underlying compiler infrastructure on top of TVM, it allows developers to focus on productivity without sacrificing the low-level optimizations necessary for state-of-the-art performance.

articles.title: ASSORT HEALTH SECURES $26 MILLION
articles.summary: Assort Health, a leading AI platform for managing patient calls, has announced new funding, bringing total capital to $26 million, to accelerate its mission of improving healthcare access. The company's technology has led to 8x revenue growth since late 2024 by reducing call hold times and increasing appointment accuracy, evidenced by high patient satisfaction. Backed by prominent investors, Assort Health integrates with EHR systems, achieving a 99% scheduling accuracy and over a 90% resolution rate.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE UPDATED HELMET BENCHMARK
articles.summary: Hugging Face has expanded its HELMET benchmark to include more models and insights, helping researchers evaluate long-context LLMs like Phi-4 and Jamba 1.6.

articles.title: GOOGLE USES AI TO CUT SCAM ADS BY 90%
articles.summary: Google's 2024 Ads Safety Report highlights how LLM upgrades blocked billions of bad ads, suspended 700K+ scam accounts, and reduced impersonation scams significantly.

articles.title: STABLE DIFFUSION NOW RUNS FASTER ON AMD GPUS
articles.summary: Stability AI and AMD optimized several Stable Diffusion models for Radeon GPUs and Ryzen AI, improving speed and performance for AMD users.

articles.title: OPENAI IN TALKS TO PAY ABOUT $3 BILLION TO ACQUIRE AI CODING STARTUP WINDSURF
articles.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire AI coding tool Windsurf for $3 billion to enhance its generative AI capabilities.

articles.title: LIQUID V1 7B (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Liquid is a multimodal LLM that integrates visual comprehension and generation by tokenizing images into discrete codes.
